name: Bisection Method
description: Find a root of f(x)=0 in interval [a,b] where f(a)·f(b) < 0. Repeatedly bisect the interval; narrow by sign of f(a)·f(mid). Linear convergence.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["f x, interval a b\n tolerance eps"]
    B1["mid = a+b over 2"]
    D1{"Converged?\nabs f mid less than eps\nor b - a less than eps"}
    D2{"f a times f mid\nless than 0?"}
    E1["b = mid"]
    E2["a = mid"]
    F1["Return mid\nApproximate root"]
    A1 --> B1
    B1 --> D1
    D1 -->|Yes| F1
    D1 -->|No| D2
    D2 -->|Yes: sequential AND| E1
    D2 -->|No: sequential AND| E2
    E1 --> B1
    E2 --> B1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000,stroke:#f59f00
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lightblue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef violet fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lavender fill:#e6e6fa,color:#333,stroke:#b19cd9
    class A1 red
    class B1 yellow
    class E1,E2 lightblue
    class F1 violet
    class D1,D2 lavender
